item_text: database -> applicazione — "registrato?" — yes: "consenti accesso" — no: "richiedi registrazione"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-utente-001 title: verify user registration module: utente source pages: 2 preconditions: test data: username: testuser, password: testpass, email: test@example.com test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" as username, "testpass" as password, and "test@example.com" as email. 2. user clicks on "register" button. 3. application sends a request to the database to check if the user is registered. 4. database checks if the user is already registered. 5. if the user is not registered, the database grants access and sends a confirmation back to the application. 6. application redirects the user to the homepage. expected result: user is registered and redirected to the homepage.

item_text: database -> applicazione — "componenti funzionanti?" — "si, ricavo impatto sostituzione componente" — "no" — "se ci sono componenti difettosi si calcola quanto impatto ha cambiarlo"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-dispositivo-001 title: add new device module: dispositivo source pages: 3, 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: device name: newdevice, device model: modelx, device id: 12345 test steps: 1. user navigates to the device management page. 2. user enters "newdevice" as the device name, "modelx" as the device model, and "12345" as the device id. 3. user selects the associated user from the dropdown list. 4. user clicks on "add device" button. 5. application sends a request to the database to add the new device. 6. database adds the new device and confirms the addition. 7. application redirects the user to the device management page. expected result: new device is added and the user is redirected to the device management page.
